Risk Description: Because performance testing has not yet been conducted and stringent requirements mandate UI page rendering within 10 seconds and API response times within 3 seconds, there is a risk that the application will fail to meet these performance SLAs during testing, which could lead to code refactoring, infrastructure capacity enhancement, project delays, and potential SLA breach penalties.
Potential Impact: Code refactoring required, infrastructure upgrades needed, delayed go-live, SLA breach, customer dissatisfaction, additional costs for performance optimization

Risk Description: Because the Rollfi payroll integration requires 59 APIs and 19 UI/UX screens to be integrated, and Axos Bank integration is primarily handled by Axos with Ascendion providing assistance, and 3 HLDs for banking integration modules (Funds Transfer, AXOS Wire Confirmations, AXOS ACH Confirmations) are still pending, there is a risk that delays or issues in third-party API availability, documentation gaps, or integration failures will occur, which could lead to blocked development, missed milestone deadlines, incomplete functional parity with legacy Zenith system, and delayed UAT.
Tech Stack: Rollfi APIs, Axos Bank APIs, AWS, .NET 8, Angular 18
Potential Impact: Development blockage, milestone delays, incomplete functional parity, extended UAT timeline, potential scope changes requiring change management process, customer onboarding delays

Risk Title: Elevated Defect Density & Test Coverage Gap Risk
Risk Description: Because the current defect density is 22.19 bugs per KLOC (significantly above the expected 2 bugs per KLOC), defect leakage is at 4.8% (near the 5% threshold), there are 44 total open bugs with repeated reopenings, API test automation is only at 22% completion, and code coverage excludes certain file types, there is a risk that undetected defects will leak into UAT and production, which could lead to customer-reported issues, increased rework costs, delayed releases, SLA breaches, and reputational damage.
Tech Stack: QA Testing, JIRA, QA Automation, Postman
Potential Impact: Customer-reported defects in UAT/production, increased rework effort, schedule delays, SLA breach, reputational damage, additional testing cycles, budget overrun for defect fixing

Risk Description: Because the project completion is only at 34% against the expected 100% based on the original plan, the UAT timeline has been revised from March 27 to April 10, 2026 (2-week delay), multiple modules are still in development or defect fixing stages, and dependencies on AXOS infrastructure and third-party integrations remain unresolved, there is a risk that further schedule slippages will occur, which could lead to cascading delays in subsequent releases, missed contractual commitments, customer dissatisfaction, and potential financial penalties.
Potential Impact: Cascading delays to Release 2 and 3, missed contractual deadlines, customer dissatisfaction, financial penalties, resource reallocation costs, compressed testing timelines increasing defect risk

Potential Impact: Development and testing disruptions, lost productivity, deployment blockages, extended testing cycles, delayed releases, increased operational costs, team frustration

Risk Description: Because the data migration strategy from legacy Zenith to NexLedgr (BMS) has not been finalized, the volume of work required is unknown, the ability to onboard 5 beta customers at go-live is uncertain, and the sequencing order for customer data movement has not been flushed out, there is a risk that data migration will be delayed, incomplete, or error-prone, which could lead to customer onboarding delays, data integrity issues, manual data entry requirements, extended go-live timelines, and customer dissatisfaction.

Potential Impact: Customer onboarding delays, data integrity issues, manual data entry fallback (resource-intensive), extended go-live timeline, customer dissatisfaction, potential data loss or corruption

Risk Description: Because the Reporting Center scope is being revisited and replanned based on ongoing POC reviews and prioritization discussions, the current Milestone 1 scope includes only 7 standard reports with SAVE AS functionality and module reports (paginated reports), and the PowerBI SAVE AS approach was agreed upon on 2/20/2026 after multiple discussion rounds, there is a risk that scope changes, requirement gaps, or technical limitations will emerge, which could lead to rework, additional development effort, scope creep, change management process invocation, and budget/schedule impacts.

Risk Description: Because Billie Part 2 uses AWS Bedrock Claude Sonnet 4.5 LLM for semantic reasoning over OCR-extracted invoice data, the UI screen that was earlier removed has been added back into scope requiring estimation and planning for future milestones, AXOS infrastructure team needs to enable Bedrock services in AWS, and the hybrid approach (LLM + Traditional ML) adds technical complexity, there is a risk that LLM integration challenges, cost overruns due to LLM usage, or infrastructure enablement delays will occur, which could lead to functional gaps, increased operational costs, delayed milestone delivery, and budget impacts.

Potential Impact: LLM integration challenges, increased operational costs for LLM usage, infrastructure enablement delays, functional gaps in invoice processing, milestone delays, budget overrun

Risk Description: Because the Deposits, Receipts, and Commissions modules have dependencies and need to be tested together, the database model went through multiple changes resulting in rework for these modules, shared services component dependencies exist, and these modules are only 36-38% complete in development with testing not yet started, there is a risk that further requirement changes, integration issues, or testing delays will occur, which could lead to cascading delays, incomplete UAT readiness, missed milestone deadlines, and compressed testing timelines.

Risk Title: Insufficient API Test Automation Coverage Risk
Risk Description: Because API test automation is only at 22% completion (below the 50% target), UI test automation is at 68% (above target but API lags significantly), the team is investigating agents for feasibility with 300+ APIs requiring automation, and API regression automation with agents has an ETA of 3/16/2026, there is a risk that insufficient automated test coverage will lead to undetected regression defects, manual testing bottlenecks, and delayed release cycles, which could result in quality issues, increased testing effort, schedule delays, and higher defect leakage.

Potential Impact: Undetected regression defects, manual testing bottlenecks, delayed release cycles, increased testing effort and costs, higher defect leakage, quality issues in production
